title: Buggy’s Crew Tightens Its Grip
description: On pages 5–8, this part begins the Orange Town storyline, where Nami’s schemes and Buggy’s crew pull Luffy and Zoro into a new conflict.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SHIPWECK SURVORS? AT A TIME LIKE THIS?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I CAN'T STOP! JUST GRAB ON AND CLIMB IN!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You would have left us to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WHAT KIND OF PERSON ARE YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WE'RE PIRATES OF BUGGY THE CLOWN!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WE'RE SORRY, MR. PIRATE HUNTER ZOLO, SIR! WE DIDN'T REALIZE WHO YOU WERE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: YOU JOKERS MADE ME LOSE MY FRIEND!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Keep rowing. If there's any land nearby, he'll get there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So, how did you pirates end up soaking in the middle of the ocean?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll tell you how!!! Shanks for reminding us!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: SHE WAS A REAL LOOKER, THOUGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WE HAD JUST FINISHED RAIDING A MERCHANT SHIP...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is a pretty good haul!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not a bad, for a small ship!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: MAYBE CAPTAIN BUGGY WILL GIVE US A REWARD!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
